name: Tiny Words - Novel 11, Book 18
description: ★ Rating: 7/10 Artistic Merit: 7 Originality: 8 Cultural Significance: 6 Intellectual Depth: 8 Dag Solstad’s Novel 11, Book 18 is a cold, precise autopsy of a middle-class man’s quiet surrender to meaninglessness. Bjorn Hansen, a civil servant in Oslo with a…
